testsuite.name: APITests.books.BooksSchemaValidation
testsuite.system-out:
Request URI: https://simple-books-api.click:443/api-clients Respuesta: {"accessToken":"54f412d9a8016668be5ab82590dd76a96092ad3580e0f3ee3ad6f3019c508c2a"} HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 417 Connection: keep-alive Date: Thu, 26 Mar 2026 19:46:55 GMT X-Amzn-Trace-Id: Root=1-69c58d2e-1861b1cf20af10e45def34a4;Parent=7f91b0c0caa4a552;Sampled=0;Lineage=1:9ee0f5ed:0 x-amzn-RequestId: 9e15d2e2-3a59-446a-ad1b-0b8d95626083 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Amz-Date, X-Api-Key, X-Amz-Security-Token x-amz-apigw-id: a2L_ZHnFoAMEDxw= Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH X-Cache: Miss from cloudfront Via: 1.1 eec3bf841ac636f9a2400eb19e13aac0.cloudfront.net (CloudFront) X-Amz-Cf-Pop: LIM50-P4 X-Amz-Cf-Id: 0Z4Ukpp2t5mbU6DX8Sgg9sjN3YRi3l1olenvtu8wkBtKMdoF5tG1rw==
[ { "id": 1, "name": "The Russian", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 3, "name": "The Vanishing Half", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 4, "name": "The Midnight Library", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 6, "name": "Viscount Who Loved Me", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 2, "name": "Just as I Am", "type": "non-fiction", "available": false }, { "id": 5, "name": "Untamed", "type": "non-fiction", "available": true } ] Request URI: https://simple-books-api.click:443/api-clients Respuesta: {"accessToken":"300a2f149f484c2cde0ccdf181fb27daf65b4c1621d7ce88ce4b27b9e93cfb07"} HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 417 Connection: keep-alive Date: Thu, 26 Mar 2026 19:47:03 GMT X-Amzn-Trace-Id: Root=1-69c58d37-5fc2b8dd3c3a7d8240581580;Parent=5f0a546c092f7605;Sampled=0;Lineage=1:9ee0f5ed:0 x-amzn-RequestId: 93a2b47d-4639-4d80-a50b-0221d572153d Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Amz-Date, X-Api-Key, X-Amz-Security-Token x-amz-apigw-id: a2MAsHPoIAMEbzQ= Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH X-Cache: Miss from cloudfront Via: 1.1 7b13d4b7bc095e51e2c6d7e031fe2bc4.cloudfront.net (CloudFront) X-Amz-Cf-Pop: LIM50-P4 X-Amz-Cf-Id: bCjRBiYZ7ip-7R17FXEb4UC4Dbdbx1KRNBHbU9MRns-9OPMaAPhy2A==
